data.biography: Park Ji Hwan is a South Korean stage and screen actor. He was born on September 5, 1980 and made his film debut in 2006. data.biography: Park Ji Hwan je jihokorejský divadelní a filmový herec. Narodil se 5. září 1980 a ve filmu debutoval v roce 2006. 樸智煥是韓國舞台和銀幕演員。他出生於 1980 年 9 月 5 日，並於 2006 年首次亮相電影。從那時起，他出演了多部電影和多部電視劇，包括《亡命之徒》（2017 年）、《閃亮人生》（2017 年）、《觸摸你的心》（2019 年）和《黑狗》（2019 年）。

data.biography: Devon Edward Sawa (born September 7, 1978) is a Canadian actor. Sawa began acting when he was a teenager and appeared in several films in the 1990s including Little Giants, Casper, Now and Then, Wild America, Idle Hands, and Final Destination. He also played the title character of the Eminem music video "Stan" and starred as Owen Elliot in The CW action spy drama series Nikita. Sawa has also played 5 different characters in the 2021 Syfy/USA network series "Chucky".
data.name: Devon Sawa

data.biography:
Devon Edward Sawa ist ein kanadischer Schauspieler. Er wuchs als eines von drei Kindern von Ed und Joyce Sawa auf. Sein Interesse, Schauspieler zu werden, wurde im Kindergarten durch einen Auftritt im Kindertheater geweckt.

Im Alter von 15 Jahren hatte er sein Filmdebüt in Die Rückkehr des Sherlock Holmes (1993). Nach zwei weiteren kleinen Rollen hatte er 1995 seine erste Hauptrolle in der Filmkomödie Casper. Eine weitere Hauptrolle übernahm er im Thriller Final Destination (2000), im Jahr zuvor war er in tragender Rolle in Die Killerhand zu sehen.

Außerdem war Sawa in einem Werbespot für die Spielzeugmarke NERF und jeweils in einem Musikvideo des Rappers Eminem (Stan, The Marshall Mathers LP) als auch der Rockband Why Store zu sehen.

2012 stand er neben Mia Kirshner und Nick Stahl in dem Found-footage-Thriller 388 Arletta Avenue vor der Kamera und drehte den Horrorfilm Sibling. Sein Schaffen umfasst mehr als 50 Film- und Fernsehproduktionen.

Seit 2010 ist Sawa mit Dawni Sahanovitch zusammen, die er am 20. Mai 2013 heiratete. Am 9. Januar 2014 wurde ein gemeinsamer Sohn geboren. 2016 bekam das Paar eine Tochter.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Devon Edward Sawa, 7 Eylül 1978 tarihinde Vancouver, Britanya Kolumbiyası, Kanada'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Kariyerine bir çocuk oyuncu olarak başlayan Sawa, 1990'lı yıllarda hızla yükselerek dönemin en popüler gençlik idollerinden biri haline geldi. Onu dünya çapında izleyicilerin hafızasına kazıyan ilk anlardan biri, "Casper" (1995) filminde canlandırdığı Casper'ın kısa süreli insan formu oldu. Bu rolün ardından "Dört Mevsim" (Now and Then) (1995) ve "Vahşi Amerika" (Wild America) (1997) gibi filmlerle genç bir yıldız olarak statüsünü pekiştirdi.

Kariyerinin zirvesine 90'ların sonu ve 2000'lerin başında ulaştı. Başrolünü üstlendiği kült korku-komedi klasiği "Öldüren Eller" (Idle Hands) (1999) ve dev bir film serisini başlatan gişe rekortmeni korku filmi "Son Durak" (Final Destination) (2000) ile adını sinema tarihine yazdırdı. Alex Browning rolü, onun en bilinen performanslarından biri olarak kabul edilir. Aynı dönemde, Eminem'in kültürel bir fenomene dönüşen "Stan" adlı müzik videosunda canlandırdığı takıntılı hayran karakteri, onun en ikonik ve güçlü performanslarından biri olarak tarihe geçti.

Bu yoğun şöhret döneminin ardından bir süre spot ışıklarından uzaklaşan Sawa, 2010'lu yıllarda kariyerinde güçlü bir geri dönüş başlattı. The CW kanalının aksiyon dizisi "Nikita"da (2010-2013) canlandırdığı Owen Elliot/Sam Matthews karakteriyle televizyona başarılı bir dönüş yaptı.

Ancak Sawa'nın kariyer rönesansı ("Sawa-ssance" olarak da bilinir), korku türüne geri dönmesiyle zirveye ulaştı. Özellikle, korku ikonu Don Mancini tarafından yaratılan "Chucky" (2021-günümüz) dizisindeki performanslarıyla büyük beğeni topladı. Dizinin her sezonunda farklı bir karakteri (Lucas Wheeler, Logan Wheeler, Peder Bryce ve hatta ABD Başkanı gibi) canlandırması, hem eleştirmenlerden hem de hayranlardan tam not aldı ve onun modern korku türündeki yerini sağlamlaştırdı. Ayrıca "Hunter Hunter" (2020) gibi bağımsız gerilim filmlerindeki rolleriyle de takdir topladı. Devon Sawa, 90'ların bir gençlik idolünden, günümüz korku sinemasının sevilen ve saygı duyulan bir figürüne başarıyla dönüşen bir kariyer hikayesine sahiptir.

梅婷，1975年4月30日出生于江苏省南京市，1996年考入中央戏剧学院表演系，中国内地女演员。1994年，梅婷首次出演电视剧《血色童心》。2001年，主演反映家庭暴力的电视剧《不要和陌生人说话》。2003年，凭借家庭伦理剧《让爱重来》获得第21届中国电视金鹰奖观众喜爱的女演员奖。 2014年，主演家庭情感剧《父母爱情》，凭借该剧获得第30届中国电视剧飞天奖优秀女演员奖，中国电视剧导演工作委员会最佳女主角。2016年，加盟古装权谋剧《琅琊榜之风起长林》。1997年，凭借与张国荣合作的爱情电影《红色恋人》获得第22届国际开罗电影节最佳女演员奖及第5届中国电影华表奖最佳女演员奖。2005年，凭借爱情电影《阿司匹林》提名第25届中国电影金鸡奖最佳女主角。2015年，凭借文艺电影《推拿》获得第15届华语电影传媒大奖最佳女配角奖。2007年，梅婷与鄢颇离婚，2012年底在与曾剑在香港闪婚。2013年9月27日，在香港诞下女儿。2016年4月，参加亲子真人秀《妈妈是超人》。
data.name: 梅婷

data.biography: Mei Ting (Chinese: 梅婷) is an award-winning Chinese actress.
data.name: Mei Ting

data.biography:
梅婷，1975 年 4 月 30 日出生於江蘇省南京市，1996 年考入中央戲劇學院表演系，中國內地女演員。1994 年，梅婷首次出演電視劇《血色童心》。2001 年，主演反映家庭暴力的電視劇《不要和陌生人説話》。2003 年，憑藉家庭倫理劇《讓愛重來》獲得第 21 屆中國電視金鷹獎觀眾喜愛的女演員獎。

2014 年，主演家庭情感劇《父母愛情》，憑藉該劇獲得第 30 屆中國電視劇飛天獎優秀女演員獎，中國電視劇導演工作委員會最佳女主角。2016 年，加盟古裝權謀劇《琅琊榜之風起長林》。1997 年，憑藉與張國榮合作的愛情電影《紅色戀人》獲得第 22 屆國際開羅電影節最佳女演員獎及第 5 屆中國電影華表獎最佳女演員獎。2005 年，憑藉愛情電影《阿司匹林》提名第 25 屆中國電影金雞獎最佳女主角。2015 年，憑藉文藝電影《推拿》獲得第 15 屆華語電影傳媒大獎最佳女配角獎。2007 年，梅婷與鄢頗離婚，2012 年底在與曾劍在香港閃婚。2013 年 9 月 27 日，在香港誕下女兒。2016 年 4 月，參加親子真人秀《媽媽是超人》。
data.name: 梅婷

data.biography: Mun Ka-young (Korean: 문가영; born July 10, 1996) is a South Korean actress. She was born in Karlsruhe, Germany to South Korean parents; her family moved back to Korea when she was 10 years old. She began her acting career in 2006 as a child actress, appearing in both film and television.  She used to be part of SM (in S.M. Culture & Contents) and acted in some productions in link with SM artists such as TVXQ 's Max Changmin in "Mimi" (2014) and with EXO in "EXO Next Door" (2015). In 2018, she started to gain popularity with "Tempted" as the second lead female actress. In 2019, she got the first lead role in "Welcome to Waikiki 2" and in 2020, she gained even more recognition with her lead role in the dramas "Find Me In Your Memory" and "True Beauty".
data.name: Mun Ka-young

文佳煐 （韩语：문 가 영／文佳煐，英语：Mun Ka-Young，1996年7月10日－），韩国女演员。出生于德国卡尔斯鲁厄。三年级回到韩国，熟练三国语言，昵称	文科、公车妖精  国籍  德国巴登-符腾堡邦卡尔斯鲁厄，成均馆大学演技艺术系毕业

15年前代表作品	2018年《伟大的诱惑者》2020年《那个男人的记忆法》2020年《女神降临》2023《爱情的理解》， 在《记忆法》中演技得到蜕变般的成长，《女神》大爆。

data.biography: Moon Ga Young je jihokorejská herečka a modelka. Narodila se 10. července 1996 v Karlsruhe v Německu jihokorejským rodičům. Ga Young se v roce 2006, když jí bylo 10 let, přestěhovala zpět do Koreje a hned poté zahájila svou hereckou kariéru jako dětská herečka, která se objevovala jak ve filmech, tak v seriálech. Patří k nadějným herečkám. V roce 2014 si dospívající Moon zahrála svou první hlavní roli ve čtyřdílném mysteriózním/romantickém dramatu Mimi a pak v "EXO Next Door". V roce 2018 získala popularitu v seriálu "Tempted" jako druhá hlavní ženská herečka. V roce 2019 získala hlavní roli v seriálu "Welcome to Waikiki 2" a v roce 2020 si získala ještě větší uznání hlavní rolí v dramatu "Find Me In Your Memory" a "True Beauty".

Mun Ka-Young é uma atriz e modelo sul-coreana. Ela nasceu em Karlsruhe, Alemanha, filha de pais sul-coreanos, em 10 de julho de 1996. Ka Young voltou para a Coreia em 2006, quando tinha 10 anos, e imediatamente começou sua carreira de atriz como atriz infantil, aparecendo em ambos cinema e televisão sob SM C&C.

Em 3 de julho de 2018, a SM Culture & Contents (SM C&C) fez um aviso oficial de que a gestão da atriz Mun Ka Young foi transferida da SM C&C para sua afiliada, KeyEast, onde ela está atualmente. Em 2014, a adolescente Moon desempenhou seu primeiro papel principal em Mimi, um drama de mistério/romance de quatro episódios.

文佳煐 （韓語：문 가 영／文佳煐，英語：Mun Ka - Young，1996 年 7 月 10 日－），韓國女演員。出生於德國卡爾斯魯厄。三年級回到韓國，熟練三國語言，暱稱 文科、公車妖精 國籍 德國巴登 - 符騰堡邦卡爾斯魯厄，成均館大學演技藝術系畢業 15 年前代表作品 2018 年《偉大的誘惑者》2020 年《那個男人的記憶法》2020 年《女神降臨》2023《愛情的理解》， 在《記憶法》中演技得到蜕變般的成長，《繞樑三日媽媽 Sing》大爆。
data.name: 文佳煐

data.biography: Mun Ka-young (koreański: 문가영; ur. 10 lipca 1996) jest południowokoreańską aktorką. Urodziła się w Karlsruhe w Niemczech, jej rodzice są Koreańczykami; jej rodzina wróciła do Korei, gdy miała 10 lat. Swoją karierę aktorską rozpoczęła w 2006 roku jako dziecko, występując w filmach i telewizji. Była częścią SM (w S.M. Culture & Contents) i zagrała w kilku produkcjach z artystami SM, takimi jak Max Changmin z TVXQ w „Mimi” (2014) i z EXO w „EXO Next Door” (2015). W 2018 roku zaczęła zyskiwać popularność dzięki „Tempted” jako drugiej głównej aktorce. W 2019 roku otrzymała swoją pierwszą główną rolę w filmie „Welcome to Waikiki 2”, a w 2020 roku zyskała jeszcze większe uznanie dzięki głównej roli w dramatach „Find Me In Your Memory” i „True Beauty”.
data.name: Moon Ga-young

data.biography: The middle of five children. His father was a police officer/detective and his mother was a social worker. He received his B.A. from St. Vincent College in Latrobe, Pennsylvania and pursued his M.F.A. on a full scholarship at the Catholic University of America in Washington, D.C. Kelly has appeared in numerous off-Broadway and off-off-Broadway productions, primarily at the Public Theater and the Second Stage. A product of regional national theater, he has been a company member of the Williamstown Theatre Festival, the Folger Theater, Arena Stage, and the Actors Theater of Louisville among others. He toured with the National Players, the oldest classical touring company in the United States. He starred on Broadway as Brick opposite Kathleen Turner in "Cat on a Hot Tin Roof", and as Paul Verrall opposite Madeline Kahn in "Born Yesterday". In 2003, he appeared at the Mark Taper Theater Forum, originating the role of Richard in "Living Out" by Lisa Loomer.
data.name: Daniel Hugh Kelly

Kellan Rudnicki is a dedicated and innovative filmmaker as well as community leader at DBS Films. Kellan, alongside his brother, has played a pivotal role in shaping a new style of filmmaking.

Under Kellan's unique approach to community building DBS Films has become a powerhouse of creativity, known for its unique approach to filmmaking. That has successfully established a vibrant community that goes beyond traditional filmmaking boundaries, engaging fans not just as spectators but as active participants in the cinematic journey.

At the heart of Kellan Rudnicki's involvement in DBS Films is his passion for storytelling. Whether it's crafting compelling narratives, overseeing the meticulous editing process, or managing the intricacies of film production, Kellan's multifaceted role showcases his commitment to creating immersive and unforgettable experiences for audiences.

Beyond his technical expertise, Kellan is a visionary who understands the importance of building a community around the art of filmmaking. His collaborative spirit has allowed DBS Films to transcend the conventional filmmaker-audience relationship, fostering an environment where fans are integral contributors to the creative process.

With a keen focus on writing, editing, production, and community management, Kellan Rudnicki has proven himself as a driving force in the film industry. His ability to blend artistic vision with practical execution sets him apart, making DBS Films a trailblazer in the realm of collaborative and fan-centric filmmaking. As Kellan continues to push boundaries and redefine the cinematic landscape, his impact on the industry is sure to be felt for years to come.
data.name: Kellan Rudnicki

data.biography:
Yang Hyuk, formerly known as Gun, is a South Korean singer, dancer, former member of ENOi and current member of OMEGA X.

He made his debut in April 2019 (under the stage name Gun) as ENOi's lead rapper, sub-vocalist, visual and maknae with their first single, "Bloom". The group struggled to promote and the members had different ideas of what type of music they should be releasing. So, in January 2021, Kithewhale Entertainment announced the group's disbandment. Four members remained with the company but he decided to leave.

After switching agencies, he re-debuted in July 2021 (under the stage name Hyuk) as a member of OMEGA X with their first single album, "Vamos". However, in October 2022, a video of the CEO of OMEGA X's label (Spire Entertainment) abusing him and his group members came to light. The members filed a lawsuit against their company to cancel their exclusive contracts and to file for the trademark of their group name. In January 2023, OMEGA X won the lawsuit and officially ended their contract with the agency. This was finally made official on May 8, 2023. The group is has been represented by IPQ since July 2023.
data.name: Yang Hyuk

Zazie Olivia Beetz (/zəˈsiː ˈbeɪts/ zə-SEE BAYTS; German: [zaˈsiː ˈbeːts]; born June 1, 1991) is a German-American actress. She is known for her role in the FX comedy-drama series Atlanta (2016–2022), for which she received a nomination for the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Supporting Actress in a Comedy Series. She starred in the Netflix anthology series Easy (2016–2019) and has voiced Amber Bennett in the adult animated superhero series Invincible since 2021.

In films, Beetz appeared in the disaster film Geostorm (2017) and portrayed the Marvel Comics character Domino in the superhero film Deadpool 2 (2018). She portrayed Arthur Fleck/Joker's neighbour, Sophie, in the psychological thriller Joker (2019) and its sequel Joker: Folie à Deux (2024).

data.biography:
Zazie Beetz est une actrice américaine née en Allemagne, surtout connue pour le rôle de Vanessa sur Atlanta. En 2016, elle est également apparue dans la série d'anthologie Netflix Easy.

Se produisant dans les théâtres communautaires et sur les scènes locales depuis l'enfance, Zazie a trouvé sa joie à l'école primaire et a grandi en jouant les filles. Née en Allemagne et originaire de New York, Zazie a grandi entre Washington Heights et Berlin, parlant allemand et anglais avec sa famille à la maison. Elle a reçu une formation de la Harlem School of the Arts et de la LaGuardia Arts Highschool, mais elle a pris le temps d'étudier le français, de se sentir fantaisiste et de vivre à Paris pendant son séjour au Skidmore College. Le théâtre a continué à vivre aux côtés de son amour pour la langue et les voyages, alors, après avoir obtenu son diplôme en 2013, elle a décidé de rassembler son courage et de poursuivre une carrière dans le spectacle.

Vivant maintenant à Harlem, elle a depuis lors eu l'occasion de travailler sur divers films new-yorkais et est heureuse de se retrouver sur divers décors, avec toutes sortes de personnes colorées - naviguant sur son chemin en tant qu'actrice de travail. Elle a étudié avec Will Bond et Gameela Wright, a collaboré avec le réalisateur Bart Freundlich et jouera dans la prochaine série télévisée de Donald Glover ! Zazie est fière de faire partie de cette communauté d'artistes non conventionnelle mais magnifique, et a le cœur ouvert pour tout ce qui est à venir.

💥Зази Оливия Битц. Родилась в 1991-ом году в Берлине, Германия. Росла в семье с младшим братом. Отец работал столяром, а мать была социальным работником. Училась в Скидморском колледже. Работает актрисой. С 2023-го замужем за актёром Дэвидом Рисдалом, детей у пары нет

data.biography:
Zazie Beetz é uma atriz americana nascida na Alemanha, mais conhecida pelo papel de Vanessa em Atlanta. Em 2016 ela também apareceu na antologia da Netflix, Easy.

Atuando em teatros comunitários e palcos locais desde a infância, Zazie encontrou sua alegria na escola e cresceu agindo como uma menina. Nascida na Alemanha e nascida em Nova York, Zazie foi criada entre Washington Heights e Berlim, falando alemão e inglês com a família dela em casa. Ela recebeu treinamento da Escola de Artes do Harlem e da Escola de Artes LaGuardia, mas teve tempo de estudar francês, se sentir sofisticada e morar em Paris durante seu tempo no Skidmore College. O teatro continuou a viver ao lado de seu amor pela linguagem e pelas viagens, e assim que se formou em 2013, ela decidiu reunir coragem e seguir uma carreira na apresentação.

Vivendo no Harlem agora, ela já teve a oportunidade de trabalhar em vários filmes de Nova York e está feliz em se encontrar em diversos cenários, com todos os tipos de pessoas coloridas - navegando em seu caminho como atriz de trabalho. Ela estudou com Will Bond e Gameela Wright, colaborou com o diretor Bart Freundlich e estará estrelando a próxima série de televisão de Donald Glover! Zazie se orgulha de fazer parte dessa comunidade de artistas não convencionais, mas bonita, e tem seu coração aberto para o que está por vir.

Beetz wurde in Berlin als Tochter eines deutschen Möbelschreiners und einer US-amerikanischen Sozialarbeiterin geboren. Sie hat einen jüngeren Bruder. Ihre Großeltern väterlicherseits leben in Berlin-Lichtenberg.

Sie wuchs im New Yorker Stadtviertel Washington Heights und in Berlin-Charlottenburg auf. In ihrer Kindheit verbrachte sie jede Sommerferien mit ihrer Familie im Allgäu. Bis zum Jahr 2009 besuchte Beetz die auf Kunst und Schauspiel ausgerichtete Fiorello H. LaGuardia High School, wo sie ihre ersten Erfahrungen im Theaterbereich sammelte. Danach studierte sie bis zum Mai 2013 am Skidmore College in Saratoga Springs Französisch und Literatur.

Ab dem Jahr 2013 folgten erste Auftritte in Kurzfilmen. Einem größeren Publikum wurde sie ab dem Jahr 2016 durch ihre Hauptrolle in der Fernsehserie Atlanta bekannt. Danach folgte eine Rolle in der Netflix-Serie Easy. In der Comicverfilmung Deadpool 2 war sie 2018 an der Seite von Ryan Reynolds und Josh Brolin als Superheldin Domino zu sehen. Im Jahr darauf spielte sie neben Joaquin Phoenix in Joker die Rolle der Sophie Dumond.

Ende Juni 2020 wurde Beetz ein Mitglied der Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences. Beetz lebt in New York City. Sie spricht fließend Englisch, Deutsch und Französisch.

Zazie Olivia Beetz (Berlin, 1991. június 1. –) német-amerikai színésznő.

Beetz Berlinben, Németországban született. Apja a berlini fal leomlása után, 1990-ben költözött az Egyesült Államokba, édesanyja afro-amerikai szociális munkás. Szülei New Yorkban dolgoztak, és bár Beetz berlini iskolába járt és a New York-i Washington Heights környéken nőtt fel, otthon németül és angolul is beszélgettek, így mindkét nyelvet elsajátította.

A Muscota New Schoolban töltött ideje alatt kezdett érdeklődni a színészet iránt, közösségi színházakban és a helyi darabokban lépett fel. 2009-ben végzett a LaGuardia Művészeti Gimnáziumban, ezt követően pedig a New York-i Skidmore főiskolára járt, de egy évet Párizsban is eltöltött.

A 2016-tól az Atlanta című amerikai televíziós sorozatban játszott szerepével lett ismert, amiért 2018-ban jelölték a a legjobb női vígjátéksorozat mellékszereplőnek járó Emmy-díjra is. 2016 és 2017 között szerepelt a Netflixen futó Easy televíziós sorozatban is.

Első jelentősebb filmszerepe a 2017-es Űrviharban volt, de játszott a Marvel Comics 2018-as szuperhősfilmében, a Deadpool 2-ben és a 2019-es Joker című pszichológiai thrillerben is.

Η Ζαζί Ολίβια Μπιτζ (Zazie Olivia Beetz) είναι Γερμανίδα και Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός. Είναι γνωστή για τον ρόλο της στην κωμική-δραματική σειρά του FX Atlanta (2016–2022), για την οποία έλαβε υποψηφιότητα για το Primetime Emmy Award για τον εξαιρετικό δεύτερο γυναικείο ρόλο σε κωμική σειρά. Πρωταγωνίστησε στην ανθολογική σειρά του Netflix Easy (2016–2019) και έχει εκφράσει τη φωνή της Amber Bennett στη σειρά κινουμένων σχεδίων υπερήρωων Invincible από το 2021.

Η Μπιτζ εμφανίστηκε στην ταινία καταστροφής Geostorm (2017) και απεικόνισε τον χαρακτήρα της Domino στην ταινία υπερήρωων Deadpool 2 (2018). Απεικόνισε τη γειτόνισσα του Άρθουρ Φλεκ / Τζόκερ Σόφι στο ψυχολογικό θρίλερ Τζόκερ (2019) και το σίκουελ του Τζόκερ: Folie à Deux (2024).

data.biography:
Kathryn Love Newton (born February 8, 1997) is an American actress. She is known for her starring roles as Louise Brooks in the CBS comedy series Gary Unmarried (2008–2010), Abigail Carlson in the HBO mystery drama series Big Little Lies (2017–2019), and Allie Pressman in the Netflix teen drama series The Society (2019). She is also known for portraying the older versions of Claire Novak in The CW dark fantasy series Supernatural (2014–2018) and Joanie Clark in the AMC period drama series Halt and Catch Fire (2016–2017).

Newton has appeared in various films, including Bad Teacher (2011), Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri (2017), Blockers (2018), Pokémon Detective Pikachu (2019), Freaky (2020), The Map of Tiny Perfect Things (2021), Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania (2023), and Abigail (2024). For her role in the horror film Paranormal Activity 4 (2012), Newton received the Young Artist Award for Best Leading Young Actress in a Feature Film.

data.biography: Kathryn Newton (née le 8 février 1997) est une actrice américaine de cinéma et de télévision, surtout connue pour avoir joué Louise Brooks dans la série télévisée de CBS "La nouvelle vie de Gary", ainsi que pour son rôle d'Alex Nelson dans le long métrage de 2012 "Paranormal Activity 4", qui lui a valu le Young Artist Award 2013 de la meilleure jeune actrice principale dans un long métrage.

Kathryn Newton (* 8. Februar 1997 in Los Angeles, Kalifornien) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin, die vor allem durch ihre Rolle der Louise Brooks aus der US-Fernsehserie Gary Unmarried bekannt ist.  Ihren ersten Fernsehauftritt hatte sie schließlich im Jahre 2001 in der Seifenoper All My Children, wo sie die Rolle der jungen Colby Marian Chandler übernahm und diese Rolle bis einschließlich 2004 innehatte. Parallel zu ihrer Zeit bei All My Children wurde Newton im Jahre 2002 im mehrfach ausgezeichneten Kurzfilm Abbie Down East in einer der Hauptrollen eingesetzt und übernahm auch im 2003 veröffentlichten und ebenfalls ausgezeichneten Kurzfilm Bun-Bun eine weitere wesentliche Rolle.

Nach einigen Jahren ohne nennenswerte Engagements im Film- und Fernsehbereich übernahm sie im Jahre 2008 die Rolle der Louise Brooks in der CBS-Fernsehserie Gary Unmarried. 2011 hatte sie einen Auftritt im Film Bad Teacher. Bis zum Auslaufen der Serie im Jahre 2010 wurde sie in allen produzierten Episoden, bis auf die bereits genannte Pilotfolge, eingesetzt und wurde für ihre Rolle mehrfach ausgezeichnet bzw. nominiert. Im Jahre 2011 ist sie auch in einer Nebenrolle im Film Bad Teacher zu sehen. 2012 spielte Newton die Hauptrolle im vierten Teil der Paranormal-Activity-Reihe, wofür sie bei den Young Artist Awards 2013 neben Quvenzhané Wallis den Preis als Beste Hauptdarstellerin in einem Spielfilm gewinnen konnte.

Кетрін Ньютон — американська акторка, володарка премії «Молодий актор» за виконання головної ролі у фільмі «Паранормальне явище 4».

Народилася в родині Девіда та Робін Ньютонів. Її батько захоплювався гольфом і показував результативність у цьому виді спорту. Донька у 8 років закохалась у гольф і почала ним займатися. Закінчила середню школу Нотр-Дам у Каліфорнії.

凯瑟琳·洛夫·牛顿（Kathryn Love Newton，1997年2月8日-），美国女演员。她因在 CBS 喜剧系列《加里未婚》（2008-2010 年）中饰演路易丝·布鲁克斯、在 HBO 悬疑剧集《大小谎言》（2017-2019 年）中饰演阿比盖尔·卡尔森和 Netflix 青少年剧集《社会》（2019 年）中的艾莉·普雷斯曼而闻名。她还因在 CW 黑暗奇幻剧集《超自然》（2014-2018 年）中饰演老版本的克莱尔·诺瓦克和在 AMC 时代剧集《停火》（2016-2017 年）中饰演乔安妮·克拉克而闻名。

牛顿曾出演喜剧电影《坏老师》（2011 年）、超自然恐怖片《超自然活动 4》（2012 年），并因此获得青年艺术家奖剧情片最佳青年女主角奖、犯罪剧情片《密苏里州埃宾郊外的三块广告牌》（2017 年）、性喜剧电影《阻挡者》（2018 年）、剧情片《本回来了》（2018 年）、 电影《神奇宝贝大侦探皮卡丘》（2019 年）、恐怖喜剧电影《怪胎》（2020 年）、科幻浪漫喜剧《完美事物地图》（2021 年）、超级英雄电影《蚁人与黄蜂女：量子狂热》（2023 年）和恐怖电影《丽莎·弗兰肯斯坦》（2024 年）和《阿比盖尔》（2024 年）。

Hänet tunnetaan myös Claire Novakin vanhempien versioiden esittämisestä The CW:n synkässä fantasiasarjassa Supernatural (2014-2018) ja Joanie Clarkin esittämisestä AMC:n periodidraamasarjassa Halt and Catch Fire (2016-2017).

嘉芙蓮·洛芙·紐頓（Kathryn Love Newton，1997 年 2 月 8 日-），美國女演員。早期成名作包括電視劇《加里離婚記》（2008 年至 2010 年）、《狙魔人》（2014 年至 2018 年），以及電影《午夜再三來嚇》（2012 年）。其中憑藉在《午夜再三來嚇》中的演出而贏得青年藝術家獎最佳長片青年女主角。

夏嫣，中國影視女演員、流行樂歌手。出生於湖北荊州，祖籍湖南。

2012 年夏嫣獲香港著名電影人黃百鳴賞識成為合約藝人正式進入演藝圈。主演的首部電影榮獲第五屆澳門國際電影節“金蓮花獎最佳影視新人獎” 。夏嫣搭檔著名影星古天樂主演了五部《Z 風暴》系列電影 ，票房累計突破 20 億 。
data.name: 夏嫣

data.biography:
Satoshi Hashimoto is a Japanese actor and voice actor.  Satoshi Hashimoto (橋本 さとし, Hashimoto Satoshi) is a Japanese seiyū (voice actor), born on April 26, 1966 in Hirakata, Osaka, Japan. His blood type is O. He started his professional career on 1989 with the agency Gekidan Shinkanzen (劇団☆新感線) and became a good friend with Jun Hashimoto. He is currently affiliated with the Cube Group seiyū agency. He owns two male long-haired chihuahuas named Chop and Hook.

Although not hugely active in the Japanese anime industry, Hashimoto is a prolific actor in various other entertainment fields. He has done many live-action movies, TV dramas and stage plays, and has made appearances in several television commercials. He was acting regularly for TV dramas until he announced a break from them in 2005.

He has also had voiceover experience playing Fire Convoy (Optimus Prime) in the original Japanese version of Transformers: Robots in Disguise.
data.name: Satoshi Hashimoto

data.biography:
郑楚一，原名郑矗立，1981年8月16日出生于山东省，中国内地影视男演员，毕业于中央戏剧学院。

2002年，出演高希希导执导现实题材电视剧《结婚十年》，从而进入演艺圈。2009年，出演励志剧《人生》中的男二号。2011年7月，主演的商战剧《大时代》开播。2011年，主演抗战励志剧《神枪》。2013年，参演古装权谋剧《谋圣鬼谷子》。2015年，出演年代谍战剧《卧底》。2016年，主演民国青春悬疑喜剧《暧昧侦探》。2017年，参演的悬疑故事片《记忆大师》上映。2018年，凭借犯罪悬疑片《暴雪将至》获得第十四届长春电影节最佳青年男配角奖提名。2019年，参演古装剧《大秦帝国之天下》，同年加盟悬疑动作网剧《双探》。
data.name: 郑楚一

data.biography:

2002 年，出演高希希導執導現實題材電視劇《結婚十年》，從而進入演藝圈。2009 年，出演勵志劇《人生》中的男二號。2011 年 7 月，主演的商戰劇《大時代》開播。2011 年，主演抗戰勵志劇《神槍》。2013 年，參演古裝權謀劇《謀聖鬼谷子》。2015 年，出演年代諜戰劇《掃毒師姐》。2016 年，主演民國青春懸疑喜劇《曖昧偵探》。2017 年，參演的懸疑故事片《記憶大師》上映。2018 年，憑藉犯罪懸疑片《暴雪將至》獲得第十四屆長春電影節最佳青年男配角獎提名 。2019 年，參演古裝劇《大秦帝國之天下》，同年加盟懸疑動作網劇《雙探》。

data.biography:
Liu Kai-Chi is a Hong Kong actor, best known for his "everyman" supporting roles. He is a Christian, and has appeared in several Christian themed projects. For 25 years he worked for TVB, Hong Kong's first over-the-air commercial station, but did not renew his contract in 2005.

On April 5, 2006, Liu's youngest son died after struggling with leukemia for three years. He was born in 2000. Liu's two older sons with his wife, Hong Kong actress Chan Man-yee, were born in 1994 and 1998.

He was born on the same day as international superstar Jackie Chan with whom he co-starred in New Police Story

廖启智，1954年4月7日出生于香港。香港演员。第八届无线艺员训练班毕业。

1980年，廖启智参演民国题材电视剧《上海滩》出道；1992年，主演了剧情片《笼民》，并因此获得1993年香港金像奖最佳男配角奖；1997年，主演了刑侦系列电视剧《刑事侦缉档案III》；2003年，参演《无间道2》获得2004年金像奖最佳男配角提名、第4届华语电影传媒大奖港台最佳男配角；2005年，参演了时装警匪功夫片《杀破狼》，因此片提名2006年金像奖最佳男配角；2008年，凭借动作片《证人》夺得2009年金像奖最佳男配角奖；2010年，因动作片《线人》获金像奖最佳男配角提名；2012年，参演了动作片《消失的子弹》，并第六次获金像奖最佳男配角提名；2014年，主演了反贪犯罪电影《反贪风暴》。2018年12月2日，荣获首届绍兴柯桥新锐电影节最经典男演员奖。
data.name: 廖启智

廖啟智，1954 年 4 月 7 日出生於香港。香港演員。第八屆無線藝員訓練班畢業。

1980 年，廖啟智參演民國題材電視劇《上海灘》出道； 1992 年，主演了劇情片《籠民》，並因此獲得 1993 年香港金像獎最佳男配角獎； 1997 年，主演了刑偵系列電視劇《刑事偵緝檔案 III》； 2003 年，參演《無間道Ⅱ》獲得 2004 年金像獎最佳男配角提名、第 4 屆華語電影傳媒大獎港台最佳男配角； 2005 年，參演了時裝警匪功夫片《殺破狼》，因此片提名 2006 年金像獎最佳男配角； 2008 年，憑藉動作片《5 時恭候的證人》奪得 2009 年金像獎最佳男配角獎； 2010 年，因動作片《線人》獲金像獎最佳男配角提名； 2012 年，參演了動作片《消失的子彈》，並第六次獲金像獎最佳男配角提名； 2014 年，主演了反貪犯罪電影《Z 風暴》。

2018 年 12 月 2 日，榮獲首屆紹興柯橋新鋭電影節最經典男演員獎。

data.biography:
Ranveer Singh Bhavnani (born 6 July 1985) is an Indian film actor who appears in Hindi films. After completing a bachelor's degree from Indiana University, Bloomington, Singh returned to India to pursue a career in film. He made his acting debut in 2010 with a leading role in Yash Raj Films' romantic comedy Band Baaja Baaraat. The film emerged as a critical and commercial success, earning Singh a Filmfare Award in the Best Male Debut category.

Singh went on to star in the romantic drama Lootera (2013), Sanjay Leela Bhansali's tragic romance Goliyon Ki Raasleela Ram-Leela (2013), his biggest commercial successes to that point, and in the action-drama Gunday (2014). In 2015, he starred in the ensemble comedy-drama Dil Dhadakne Do (2015), and portrayed Bajirao in the historical romance Bajirao Mastani, one of the highest-grossing Bollywood films, for which he garnered critical acclaim and won the Filmfare Award for Best Actor.
data.name: Ranveer Singh

data.biography:
Ranveer Singh Bhavnani è un attore Indiano che appare in film Hindi. Dopo aver completato la laurea presso l'Indiana University, Bloomington, Ranveer è tornato in India per intraprendere una carriera nel cinema. Ha debuttato nel 2010 con il ruolo di protagonista nella commedia romantica Band Baaja Baaraat. Il film è emerso come un successo di critica e commerciale, facendo guadagnare a Ranveer il premio Filmfare nella categoria miglior debutto maschile.

Ranveer ha poi continuato a sperimentare cimentandosi in ruoli diversi quali il genio della truffa in Ladies vs Ricky Bahl (2011), il ladro in incognito in Lootera - acclamato dalla critica (2013) - e il Gujarat innamorato, ispirato al personaggio di Romeo (dal dramma di William Shakespeare Romeo e Giulietta) in Goliyon Ki Raasleela Ram-Leela (2013).

Ranveer Singh Bhavnani ist ein indischer Filmschauspieler, der in Hindi-Filmen auftritt. Nach dem Abschluss eines Bachelor-Abschlusses von der Indiana University, Bloomington, kehrte Singh nach Indien zurück, um eine Karriere im Filmbereich zu verfolgen. Sein Schauspieldebüt gab er 2010 mit einer Hauptrolle in Yash Raj Films' romantischer Komödie Band Baaja Baaraat. Der Film erwies sich als kritischer und kommerzieller Erfolg und erhielt Singh einen Filmfare Award in der Kategorie Bestes männliches Debüt.

Singh spielte dann in dem romantischen Drama Lootera (2013), Sanjay Leela Bhansalis tragischer Romanze Goliyon Ki Raasleela Ram-Leela (2013), seinen größten kommerziellen Erfolgen bis dahin, und im Action-Drama Gunday (2014). Im Jahr 2015 spielte er im Ensemble Komödie-Drama Dil Dhadakne Do (2015) und porträtierte Bajirao in der historischen Romanze Bajirao Mastani, einem der reichsten Bollywood-Filme, für die er von der Kritik gelobt und mit dem Filmfare Award for Best Actor ausgezeichnet wurde.

data.biography:
Callum Robilliard Turner (born 15 February 1990) is an English actor. After beginning a career as a fashion model, he began working in film and television. He had lead roles in the drama film Queen and Country (2014) and the mystery miniseries Glue (2014). He played Theseus, the brother of Newt Scamander, in the fantasy films Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald (2018) and Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets of Dumbledore (2022).

Turner's performance in the mystery series The Capture (2019) earned him a nomination for the British Academy Television Award for Best Actor. He has since starred as Joe Rantz in the biographical film The Boys in the Boat (2023) and as John "Bucky" Egan in the miniseries Masters of the Air (2024).

data.biography: David Hunt is an English actor, producer, and director who has worked in both the United Kingdom and the United States. His best known U.S. film role is Harlan Rook, in the 1988 action film The Dead Pool, the fifth installment in the Dirty Harry series. He has also had guest roles on the television sitcom Everybody Loves Raymond as Ray's nemesis neighbor, Bill Parker. He also appeared in the recurring role of Darren McCarthy during season 6 of 24. Back in the UK, Hunt was in the 1991 award-winning period drama, The Black Velvet Gown, as well as being a regular cast member of the series Beck for the BBC.

data.biography:
Kate Rooney Mara (born February 27, 1983) is an American actress. She is known for her work in television, playing reporter Zoe Barnes in the Netflix political drama House of Cards (2013–2014; 2016), computer analyst Shari Rothenberg in the Fox thriller series 24 (2006), wronged mistress Hayden McClaine in the FX miniseries American Horror Story: Murder House (2011), Patty Bowes in the first season of the FX drag ball culture drama series Pose (2018), and a teacher who begins an illicit relationship with an underage student in the FX miniseries A Teacher (2020). For the latter, she received an Independent Spirit Award nomination for Best New Scripted Series as an executive producer.

Mara made her film debut in Random Hearts(1999). She has since appeared in Brokeback Mountain (2005), We Are Marshall (2006), Shooter (2007), Transsiberian (2008), Stone of Destiny (2008), The Open Road (2009), Transcendence (2014), The Martian (2015), Fantastic Four (2015), Morgan (2016), Megan Leavey (2017), My Days of Mercy (2017), and Chappaquiddick (2018).

Kate Rooney Mara (* 27. Februar 1983 in Bedford, Westchester County, New York) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.

Mara begann im Alter von neun Jahren in Musical- und Theateraufführungen ihrer Schule aufzutreten und spielte später professionell Theater.

Nachdem Mara die Bühne verlassen hatte, spielte sie 1997 ihre erste Rolle vor der Kamera in der Serie Law & Order. 1999 drehte sie mit Joe the King ihren ersten Film. 2003 war sie in vier Folgen der Fernsehserie Nip/Tuck – Schönheit hat ihren Preis zu sehen. 2005 spielte sie die Hauptrolle in dem Horrorfilm Düstere Legenden 3 und hatte eine Nebenrolle in dem Drama Brokeback Mountain. Außerdem hatte sie eine Gastrolle in fünf Folgen der Serie 24. Größere Bekanntheit erlangte sie 2007 durch ihre Rollen in den Filmen Sie waren Helden und Shooter. In der sechsten Staffel der HBO-Serie Entourage war sie 2009 in vier Folgen als Brittany zu sehen. 2010 hatte sie einen Cameo-Auftritt in der Comic-Verfilmung Iron Man 2. Im selben Jahr drehte sie unter der Regie von Danny Boyle das biografische Drama 127 Hours. Ein Jahr später übernahm sie die Rolle Hayden McClaine in der Horrorserie American Horror Story. Von 2013 bis 2016 war sie als Zoe Barnes in der Serie House of Cards zu sehen.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Kate Mara (nascida em 27 de fevereiro de 1983) é uma atriz norte-americana de televisão e cinema. Começando a atuar em sua cidade natal, Bedford, em Nova York, ela se mudou do palco para seu primeiro filme, Random Hearts (1999). Seus papéis notáveis incluem as aparições no filme vencedor do Oscar Brokeback Mountain (2005), interpretando a filha do personagem de Heath Ledger, e na série de televisão da Fox 24 Horas, como analista de computação Shari Rothenberg.

Desde então, ela apareceu nos longas-metragens We Are Marshall (2006), Shooter (2007), Transsiberian (2008), Stone of Destiny (2008) e The Open Road (2009). Mara se juntou ao elenco da série HBO Entourage para sua sexta temporada, e apareceu em Iron Man 2, Happythankyoumoreplease e 127 Hours. Ela será a próxima estrela em Ironclad.

Mara, która dorastała w Bedford (Nowy York). Karierę aktorską rozpoczęła w wieku 9 lat w szkole muzycznej. Występowała w wielu przedstawieniach teatralnych oraz chodziła do szkół teatralno-młodzieżowych. Profesjonalną karierę zaczęła w wieku czternastu lat po zatrudnieniu pierwszego agenta. Wystąpiła wtedy w serialu "Prawo i porządek: sekcja specjalna" i filmie "Zagubione serca". Ukończyła studia Fox Lane High School rok wcześniej i zagrała gościnnie w licznych serialach telewizyjnych, w tym "Madigan Men" oraz "Ed". Miała także powtarzające się role w serialach "Everwood", "Nip / Tuck" oraz epizodyczne angaże w WB Television Network series "Jack & Bobby" wkrótce potem. Mara pojawiła się w kilku filmach fabularnych, w szczególności w tych pokazywanych na Sundance Film Festival jak np. "Debiutant" obok Sigourney Weaver i Johna Rittera. Mała również rolę w oscarowym filmie "Tajemnica Brokeback Mountain".  Występiła także w "Zoom: Akademia superbohaterów” z Timem Allenem i Courteney Cox. Kate profesjonalnie debiutowała na deskach teatru w 2003 roku na Williamstown Theatre Festival w sztuce "Landscape of the Body" obok Lili Taylor. Obecnie mieszka w Nowym Jorku i Los Angeles. Jej dalszy dorobek telewizyjny obejmuje występy w: "CSI: Kryminalne zagadki Las Vegas", "CSI: Kryminalne zagadki Miami", "Boston Public" i "Dowodach zbrodni". Wystąpiła także w filmie "Ulice strachu: Krwawa Mary", który miał premierę w lecie 2005 roku. Mara znana jest także ze swojego śpiewu. Często śpiewa hymn przed meczami z New York Giants (jest wnuczką właściciela Giants Wellington Mary oraz prawnuczką założyciela Giantsów- Tima Mary). Zaśpiewała hymn na otwarciu sezonu NFL dla Giants w 2006 roku. Nagrała album dla wytwórni Warner Brothers Rekord z zespołem Trace. Kate jest również wykwalifikowaną tancerką jazzu, tap i baletu. Niedawno podpisała kontrakt z William Morris Agency i jej kariera jest zarządzana przez Washington Square Arts & Film. Zagrała w hicie serialowym "House of Cards", wcielając się w dziennikarkę Zoe Barnes. Dużą popularność zyskała dzięki występom w takich produkcjach jak: "Strzelec", "127 godzin", "Deadfall", "Transcendencja", "Marsjanin" czy "Fantastyczna czwórka".

کیت مارا بازیگر و تهیه کننده آمریکایی متولد ۲۷ فوریه ۱۹۸۳ در بدفورد است که در شبکه نتفلیکس در سریال خانه پوشالی ۲۰۱۳ حضور یافت و به شهرت رسید. وی فعالیت خود را از سال ۱۹۹۷ آغاز نمود و تا کنون ادامه داده است. او در فیلم‌های مرد آهنی ۲ ساخت ۲۰۱۰، ۱۲۷ ساعت ۲۰۱۰، زوم ۲۰۰۶ و مریخی ۲۰۱۵ ایفای نقش کرده و یک بار نامزد دریافت جایزه امی شده است.
data.name: کیت مارا

凯特·鲁妮·玛拉（Kate Rooney Mara，1983年2月27日-），美国女演员。她以电视工作而闻名，在 Netflix 政治剧《纸牌屋》（2013-2014 年;2016 年）中饰演记者佐伊·巴恩斯，在福克斯惊悚剧集《24》（2006 年）中饰演计算机分析师莎莉·罗森伯格，在 FX 迷你剧《美国恐怖故事：谋杀屋》（2011 年）中饰演被冤枉的情妇海登·麦克莱恩，在 FX 电视剧《姿势》（2018 年）第一季中饰演帕蒂·鲍斯， 克莱尔·威尔逊 （Claire Wilson） 在 Hulu 迷你剧《老师》（2020 年）的 FX 中担任执行制片人，并因此获得了独立精神最佳新剧本剧集提名。

data.biography:
Kate Rooney Mara, 27 Şubat 1983 tarihinde Bedford, New York'ta dünyaya gelmiştir. Kız kardeşi Rooney Mara gibi o da Amerikan spor tarihinin en köklü iki ailesinden gelmektedir; New York Giants'ın kurucusu Mara ailesi ve Pittsburgh Steelers'ın kurucusu Rooney ailesinin bir üyesidir. Sahne sanatlarına olan ilgisi çok genç yaşlarda yerel tiyatrolarda ve okul oyunlarında başladı. "Sefiller" gibi müzikallerden etkilenerek oyunculuğa yönelen Mara, henüz 14 yaşındayken bir menajerle anlaştı. New York Üniversitesi Tisch Sanat Okulu'na kabul edilmesine rağmen, profesyonel oyunculuk kariyerine odaklanmak için eğitime ara vermeyi tercih etti.

Kariyerine 1997 yılında "Law & Order" dizisindeki konuk oyunculuğu ile adım atan Mara, sinemadaki ilk deneyimini Harrison Ford'un başrol oynadığı "Gerçeğin Peşinde" (Random Hearts) (1999) filmiyle yaşadı. 2000'lerin başında "Nip/Tuck", "Everwood" ve "CSI" gibi popüler televizyon dizilerinde yer alarak sektörde deneyim kazandı. Sinemadaki ilk kayda değer dikkat çekişi, Ang Lee'nin yönettiği ve Oscar ödüllü "Brokeback Dağı" (2005) filminde, Heath Ledger'ın karakterinin 19 yaşındaki kızını canlandırmasıyla gerçekleşti. Bu rolün ardından "24" dizisinde analist Shari Rothenberg karakteriyle ve Mark Wahlberg ile birlikte rol aldığı aksiyon filmi "Tetikçi" (Shooter) (2007) ile görünürlüğünü artırdı.

Kate Mara'nın kariyerindeki asıl büyük sıçrama, televizyon dünyasındaki ses getiren projelerle geldi. Ryan Murphy'nin "American Horror Story: Murder House" (2011) dizisinde canlandırdığı takıntılı karakter Hayden McClaine ile övgü topladı. Ancak onu küresel çapta bir yıldız yapan rol, Netflix'in ilk büyük orijinal yapımı olan politik gerilim dizisi "House of Cards" (2013-2014) oldu. Hırslı gazeteci Zoe Barnes karakterine hayat verdiği bu dizideki performansı, ona Primetime Emmy Ödülleri'nde En İyi Konuk Kadın Oyuncu adaylığı getirdi.

Televizyondaki bu başarısının ardından büyük bütçeli Hollywood yapımlarında önemli roller üstlendi. Ridley Scott'ın yönettiği ve büyük beğeni toplayan "Marslı" (The Martian) (2015) filminde bilgisayar uzmanı astronot Beth Johanssen'i canlandırdı. Aynı yıl "Fantastik Dörtlü" (Fantastic Four) filminde Sue Storm (Görünmez Kadın) karakteriyle süper kahraman evrenine adım attı. Bağımsız sinemada ve dramatik rollerde de yeteneğini sergileyen Mara, gerçek bir hikayeden uyarlanan "Megan Leavey" (2017) filminde başrolü üstlendi ve "Chappaquiddick" (2017) filminde Mary Jo Kopechne'yi canlandırdı. Yakın dönemde, hem başrolünü oynadığı hem de yapımcılığını üstlendiği tartışmalı mini dizi "A Teacher" (2020) ve FBI gerilimi "Class of '09" (2023) ile kariyerini sürdürmektedir. Kişisel hayatında sıkı bir hayvan hakları savunucusu olan Mara, meslektaşı Jamie Bell ile evlidir.

米ニューヨーク州ベッドフォード出身。妹のルーニー・マーラも女優で、曽祖父2人はそれぞれNFLのニューヨーク・ジャイアンツとピッツバーグ・スティーラーズの初代オーナー。ニューヨーク大学ティッシュ・スクール・オブ・アーツに進学し、1997年にTVシリーズ「LAW＆ORDER ロー＆オーダー」で女優デビュー。99年に「ランダム・ハーツ」で映画初出演を果たした。アン・リー監督の「ブロークバック・マウンテン」（05）でヒース・レジャーの娘役を演じて注目を浴び、以降「ザ・シューター　極大射程」（07）、「127時間」（10）などに出演する。その後「アメリカン・ホラー・ストーリー：精神科病棟」（11）、「ハウス・オブ・カード　野望の階段」（13～14）など話題のTVドラマにも出演。マーベル原作の映画「ファンタスティック・フォー」（15）ではヒーローチームの一員インビジブル・ガール／スー・ストーム役に起用された。その後もリドリー・スコット監督のSF映画「The Martian（原題）」（15）など大作への出演が続く。
data.name: ケイト・マーラ

data.biography: 塔尼克拉·巴拉尼 是一位印度演員、編劇、詩人、劇作家和導演，主要從事泰盧固語電影工作。他曾參與過 750 多部電影，包括泰米爾語、卡納達語和印地語。他曾三次獲得安得拉邦南迪獎。
data.name: 塔尼克拉·巴拉尼

data.biography: Tang Yajing is a voice actress for the Mainland China Mandarin dub. She was born on 13 January 1991 in China. Voicing Ash from Season 21 to Season 22. She is an actress, known for Honkai: Star Rail (2023), Run, Tiger, Run! (2022) and The Defective (2021).
data.name: Yajing Tang

data.biography: Yohanes Roosyanto Landung Laksono Simatupang is an Indonesian actor. He started acting on the drama stage and his first appearance in the film is in Daun di Atas Pillow (1998).
data.name: Landung Simatupang

data.biography: Ayaka Namiki (並木 彩華, Namiki Ayaka, born April 18, 2007) is a Japanese actress, singer, and model from Chiba Prefecture. She is a former member of Ciào Smiles, which was formed by selected members of Ciao Girl. She is affiliated with Amuse.
data.name: Ayaka Namiki

data.biography: Ayaka Namiki (並木 彩華, Namiki Ayaka, nacida el 18 de abril de 2007) es una actriz, cantante y modelo japonesa de la prefectura de Chiba. Ex integrante de Ciào Smiles, que estaba formado por miembros seleccionados de Ciao Girl. Está afiliada a Amuse.
data.name: Ayaka Namiki

data.biography: 松下奈绪，日本女演员。她在2006年以作曲家与钢琴家身份，发行出道专辑！3岁开始学习钢琴。2006年在演出连续剧与电影忙碌行程当中，松下奈绪每一首曲子都认真诚挚地投入，专辑也收录了松下创作的2首曲子，体验出她的作曲才华。而代表日本参赛2006年亚太影展的电影【铁线厥的忧郁】(Adiandum Blue)则是松下奈绪首度参与电影演出，她担任女主角叶子，电影以法国尼斯为舞台，与人气不坠的演员阿部宽有精彩对手戏演出。松下奈绪演奏片中3首电影组曲，由活跃于日本电影,日剧,广告配乐的作曲家大岛MICHIRU编写(代表作有：《钢之炼金术师》、电影《失乐园》、《模仿犯》等)，像是沉浸在「旅游欧洲，观赏欧洲」的气氛。松下的钢琴演奏有着独特风格，自然不做作的气息，宛如轻声慢语，令人心情沈稳安和。
data.name: 松下奈绪

data.biography: Nao Matsushita (松下奈緒) is a Japanese actress and singer. Nao was born in Kawanishi, Hyōgo on 8 February 1985. Winning Japan's Elite Model Look started her modeling career in earnest. She attended the Tokyo College of Music. She has released 4 albums and 3 singles in which she plays the piano as well as sings.
data.name: Nao Matsushita

data.biography: 松下奈緖，日本女演員。她在 2006 年以作曲家與鋼琴家身份，發行出道專輯！3 歲開始學習鋼琴。2006 年在演出聯續劇與電影忙碌行程當中，松下奈緖每一首曲子都認真誠摯地投入，專輯也收錄了松下創作的 2 首曲子，體驗出她的作曲才華。而代表日本參賽 2006 年亞太影展的電影【鐵線厥的憂鬱】(Adiandum Blue) 則是松下奈緖首度參與電影演出，她擔任女主角葉子，電影以法國尼斯為舞台，與人氣不墜的演員阿部寬有精彩對手戲演出。松下奈緖演奏片中 3 首電影組曲，由活躍於日本電影, 日劇, 廣告配樂的作曲家大島 MICHIRU 編寫 (代表作有：《鋼之鍊金術師》、電影《失樂園》、《模仿犯》等)，像是沉浸在「旅遊歐洲，觀賞歐洲」的氣氛。松下的鋼琴演奏有著獨特風格，自然不做作的氣息，宛如輕聲慢語，令人心情沈穩安和。
data.name: 松下奈緖

data.biography: Susan Ward (born April 15, 1976) is an American actress and model. She's known for her TV roles as Chloe Kmetko on Make It or Break It, Meg Cummings on Sunset Beach, Bree on Malibu Shores, and Kate Manat on Just Legal. Her best known film roles are as sexy neighbor Jill in Shallow Hal, and as Liz in the Jack Hunter movie trilogy. She made her film debut in the 1997 sequel, Poison Ivy: The New Seduction, before appearing in films, including, The In Crowd (2000), Going Greek (2001), Shallow Hal (2001) and Wild Things 2 (2004). She has guest starred on Friends, CSI, CSI: Miami, Major Crimes, Criminal Minds, Monk, Boomtown, Hercules (1996), and Xena (1997).
data.name: Susan Ward

data.biography: 苏珊·沃德（Susan Ward）是美国女演员和模特。她以在《Make It or Break It》中饰演 Chloe Kmetko、《日落海滩》中的梅格·卡明斯、《马里布海岸》中的布里和《Just Legal》中的凯特·马纳特而闻名。她最著名的电影角色是在《浅哈尔》中饰演性感的邻居吉尔，以及在杰克·亨特电影三部曲中饰演丽兹。
data.name: 苏珊·沃德

data.biography: 蘇珊·沃德（Susan Ward）是美國女演員和模特。她以在《Make It or Break It》中飾演 Chloe Kmetko、《日落海灘》中的梅格·卡明斯、《馬裏布海岸》中的布裏和《Just Legal》中的凱特·馬納特而聞名。她最著名的電影角色是在《淺哈爾》中飾演性感的鄰居吉爾，以及在傑克·亨特電影三部曲中飾演麗茲。
data.name: 蘇珊·沃德
